problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
